title: Annoying Villagers: Herobrine Invasion
description: Annoying Villagers is a mod that adds Player NPCs, Villager NPCs and Herobrines to your world, turning it into a chaotic battlefield.
body:
**Annoying Villagers: Herobrine Invasion** primarily adds custom mobs and weapons inspired by the Annoying Villager animated series by Mr. FudgeMonkeyz, including characters like Herobrine, Villager Scouts, and various NPC player mobs. Additionally, it enhances the AI behavior of player NPCs to make them more dynamic and challenging. With this mod, your gameplay experience will be **EXTREMELY HARD** just like in the animations. Prepare for intense battles and smarter enemies!

⚠️ Install this pack if you have problem with the mod dependencies (Sorry for curseforge link, next update I will remove some dependencies that not available on modrinth and create an official modrinth modpack link): Annoying Villagers Full Dependencies Pack

## New events Herobrine Invasion
Spoiler Herobrine Clones will spawn naturally in the game. At night, Herobrine Greg can trigger an event that summons High-Tier Herobrine Clones, such as Null, Shadow Herobrine, and Elite Herobrine. During this event, he will randomly spawn 1 to 3 High-Tier Herobrines along with 1 to 3 regular Herobrine Clones. You can stop the event by hunting down Herobrine Greg and killing him before it begins. However, if you try to kill him at night, he will summon Herobrine Clones and escape. If you try to kill him during the day, he will summon Low-Tier Herobrine Clones and escape away.
